title: Top 3 Kitchen Utensil Holder and Knife Block – Stainless Steel Cutlery Holder and Organiser Storage – Simple Drainage System – Non-Slip Cutlery Organiser – for Spoons, Forks, Knives, Ladles
features: Superior Quality: Made using high-quality 430 stainless steel material, with a strong removable ABS plastic tray, this shelf organiser is a wise choice for every kitchen. The rust-proof knife block is going to be your long-term kitchen organizer. Our stainless-steel cutlery holder is dishwasher safe at below 80-degree temperature but never uses any rough cloth or cleaning chemicals.

Efficient Drainage: The kitchen organiser comes with a simple water drainage system that helps in the easy and quick removal of excess water. The drain holes at the bottom keep the utensil holder as well as your cooking utensils dry, and clean. The removable plastic tray of the cutlery drainer further facilitates easy cleaning and keeps it free from mould and bacteria build-up.

Compact Storage: The space saver design of this cutlery, utensil and knife block organiser comprises multiple compartments that can accommodate many kitchen utensils. You can place the organiser storage block with your kitchen sink, on the countertop, shelf etc. The easy-to-assemble utensil organiser provides ideal storage for your kitchen gadgets.

Functional Design: The non-slip base of the cutlery caddy provides stability while handling sharp objects like knives and keeps your countertops scratch-free. The compartments of the kitchen utensil holder are conveniently separated so that you can put or take out each item without scratching or damaging it with the knife edge. The simple but classy outlook of the holder merges with every kitchen interior.

Multipurpose Block: The multicompetent utensils holders & organisers help you to store your kitchen utensils conveniently right after you wash them. Use the kitchen storage block for spoons, forks, knives, whisks, spatulas, soup ladle, turner, sharpening rod, kitchen scissors, etc. The knife block is suitable for storing your cutlery or as a drying stand for the utensils. Size 19x15x18cm. Knives not included.
description: Product Description Are you looking for a kitchen utensil holder that can help you to keep your kitchen organized? Our Kitchen Utensil Holder can help you to keep all your cutlery and other utensils organized. Quality and Comfort: The knife block has a solid strong body made of 430 stainless steel with a removable ABS plastic tray. The dishwasher safe cutlery drainer can be disassembled and cleaned easily. The rust-resistant and strong structure makes it a durable choice for every kitchen. R Convenient Design: The multicompetent cutlery caddy has adequate space to store different kitchen utensils separately. Appropriately separated compartments of the shelf organiser allow you to take out or put in your items conveniently, without scratching or damaging the surface of any item. Practical Choice: The utensil organiser is equipped with a simple drainage system with drain holes at the bottom. By removing excess water continuously, the utensil holder block remains clean and dry, preventing bacteria and mould build-up. With a non-scratching base, the cutlery holder has a stable design that is perfect to be placed on any countertop or kitchen shelf. Click on the button and add the utensil holder to your cart today.
